Kept the library clean and orderly to provide a welcoming environment.

bullets: Contributed to the annual dinner team for three consecutive years.
Supported event logistics including decoration, certificate handling, and (upcoming) technical team duties.
Helped ensure smooth execution of PPMK's annual dinner events.

experience.role: Dance Crew - Malaysian Student Dance Club (MSDC) Mar 2023 - Dec 2025
bullets: Active member of the dance crew, performing at sports events, cultural nights, and student gatherings.
Represented the club in performances to promote Malaysian culture among the student community.
Guided 25 primary school students in creating storytelling books using Al tools such as ChatGPT and Canva AI.

projects.name: Deep Learning - CBAM Attention-based Crowd Detection
projects.description: . Introduced a hybrid loss (MSE + SSIM + Count Loss), reducing MAE from 434 to 103 and boosting validation accuracy from 15.8% to 79.7%.
bullets: Proposed a global Gaussian kernel for more uniform ground-truth supervision and integrated CBAM attention between VGG-16 front-end and dilated convolution back-end of CSRNet.

Designed a stable training pipeline with optimized hyperparameters to ensure effective model convergence. Evaluated on the ShanghaiTech Part A dataset, showing improved density map quality and robustness to scale variation.

projects.name: Introduction to Computer Vision - TrOCR Receipt Scanner
bullets: Integrated TrOCR (Vision Transformer + autoregressive decoder) for robust text extraction from handwritten and complex real-world receipts.
Applied CLAHE contrast enhancement and Hough Transform-based affine deskewing to handle faded and warped receipt inputs.
Arranged preprocessed images into LayoutLMv3 for structured information extraction, targeting automated expense tracking and claims processing.

projects.name: RE:ALThon GDG on Campus - Al Fishing Compliance App (Excellence Award)
bullets: Contributed to sourcing and integrating public datasets, preprocessing data to ensure compatibility and enable system functionality.
Built a Flutter mobile app integrating Google Gemini API to identify fish species from camera images and determine protected/catchable status in real time.
Implemented GPS-based fishing restriction zone alerts using Naver Maps API, promoting awareness of marine protected areas.
